description: Welcome to Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022. The event features discussions on Helium's migration to Solana, workshops on SPL governance, and updates from Ledger and Render. A live podcast recording by Acquire will cover Qualcomm's history. The day will conclude with talks on Web3's role in human rights and a closing celebration.
topic_summary: Day 3 highlights include technical discussions on Helium's migration [t=40:08], workshops on SPL governance [t=65:82], and a live podcast by Acquire on Qualcomm [t=125:21]. Closing discussions will focus on Web3 and human rights [t=150:54].
